nodes.name: Webhook Trigger
nodes.notes: Receives INSPECTION_FINALIZED events from MX_00_Event_Router

nodes.name: Parse Event Data
nodes.notes: Extracts project_id, protocol_id and calculates step_key

nodes.name: Claim Workflow Step
nodes.notes: Atomic claim to prevent duplicate processing

nodes.name: Step Claimed?
nodes.notes: If claimed=true: proceed. If false: skip or exit

parameters.query:
SELECT 
  ip.id as protocol_id,
  ip.protocol_type,
  ip.inspection_date,
  ip.finalized_at,
  ip.finalized_by,
  p.id as project_id,
  p.project_number,
  p.name as project_name,
  p.object_street,
  tm.name as finalized_by_name
FROM inspection_protocols ip
JOIN projects p ON ip.project_id = p.id
LEFT JOIN team_members tm ON ip.finalized_by = tm.id
WHERE ip.id = '{{ $('Parse Event Data').item.json.protocol_id }}'::uuid;

nodes.name: Load Protocol + Project
nodes.notes: Loads protocol details with project and team member info

parameters.query:
SELECT 
  ipi.id,
  ipi.deviation_type,
  ipi.notes,
  ipi.is_additional,
  ipi.catalog_position_nr,
  ipi.status,
  op.title as position_title,
  op.position_number,
  os.title as room_name
FROM inspection_protocol_items ipi
LEFT JOIN offer_positions op ON ipi.offer_position_id = op.id
LEFT JOIN offer_sections os ON op.section_id = os.id
WHERE ipi.protocol_id = '{{ $('Parse Event Data').item.json.protocol_id }}'::uuid
  AND (ipi.deviation_type IS NOT NULL OR ipi.is_additional = true)
ORDER BY os.sort_order, op.sort_order;

nodes.name: Load Deviations
nodes.notes: Loads all deviations and additional items from protocol

nodes.name: Build Summary
nodes.notes: Counts deviations/additional items and builds summary stats

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO approvals (
  id, project_id, approval_type, status,
  requested_by, requested_at,
  request_summary, request_data,
  reference_table, reference_id
) VALUES (
  gen_random_uuid(),
  '{{ $json.project_id }}'::uuid,
  'INSPECTION',
  'PENDING',
  '{{ $json.finalized_by_name }}',
  now(),
  'Erstbegehung Prüfung — {{ $json.project_number }} {{ $json.object_street }}',
  jsonb_build_object(
    'protocol_id', '{{ $json.protocol_id }}',
    'protocol_type', '{{ $json.protocol_type }}',
    'inspection_date', '{{ $json.inspection_date }}',
    'deviation_count', {{ $json.deviation_count }},
    'additional_count', {{ $json.additional_count }},
    'deviations', '{{ $json.deviations_json }}'::jsonb,
    'finalized_by', '{{ $json.finalized_by_name }}'
  ),
  'inspection_protocols',
  '{{ $json.protocol_id }}'::uuid
)
RETURNING id;

nodes.name: Create Approval
nodes.notes: Creates PENDING approval entry for the inspection

nodes.name: Merge Approval ID
nodes.notes: Merges approval_id with summary data for downstream steps

nodes.name: Complete Workflow Step
nodes.notes: Marks workflow step as DONE with approval payload

parameters.query:
-- Mark input event as processed
DO $$ BEGIN
  UPDATE events SET processed_at = now() WHERE id = '{{ $('Merge Approval ID').item.json.event_id }}'::uuid;
EXCEPTION WHEN invalid_text_representation THEN NULL;
END $$;

-- Emit APPROVAL_REQUESTED event
INSERT INTO events (event_type, project_id, payload, source_system, source_flow, reference_table, reference_id)
VALUES (
  'APPROVAL_REQUESTED',
  '{{ $('Merge Approval ID').item.json.project_id }}'::uuid,
  jsonb_build_object(
    'approval_id', '{{ $('Merge Approval ID').item.json.approval_id }}',
    'approval_type', 'INSPECTION',
    'project_id', '{{ $('Merge Approval ID').item.json.project_id }}'
  ),
  'n8n',
  'M2_04_Inspection_Finalize',
  'approvals',
  '{{ $('Merge Approval ID').item.json.approval_id }}'::uuid
)
RETURNING id, event_type::text, project_id;

nodes.name: Emit APPROVAL_REQUESTED
nodes.notes: Marks input event processed and emits APPROVAL_REQUESTED

nodes.name: Telegram Notify
nodes.notes: Sends inspection finalize notification to Dennis

nodes.name: Done (Success)
nodes.notes: Success response with approval_id

nodes.name: Handle Not Claimed
nodes.notes: Handles DONE (skip) and IN_PROGRESS (exit)
